holdings.infoBox: EQIN is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are JPMorgan Chase & Co. stock at 4.61%, Bank of America at 4.27%, Chevron at 4.00%, UnitedHealth Group at 3.99%, and Exxon Mobil at 3.98%.

overview.description: The Columbia U.S. Equity Income ETF (EQIN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of dividend-paying US companies. The fund uses a proprietary, fundamental selection process with an exclusionary screen for ESG risk. EQIN was launched on Jun 13, 2016 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.
